name: Magnetic Bridge
description: Foundational bridge module mapping magnetic polarity (N/S) to binary states (0/1) through field resonance and interference patterns. Constructive interference encodes 1, destructive encodes 0. Field density gradients map geometric intensity and spacing to information density. The read/write protocol for silicon lattice computation.

core_attributes.pattern: polarity-to-binary translation, field interference encoding, density gradient mapping
